input: Standup update: Yesterday I worked on the login page redesign, got the Figma mockups approved. Today I'll start implementing the new layout. No blockers.
Quick update — the database migration script is 70% done. Should be ready for review by EOD tomorrow. Running into some edge cases with null values but nothing blocking.
Deployed v2.3.1 to staging. All smoke tests passing. Will promote to production after QA signs off, probably Thursday.
미팅 참석 알림: 내일 오후 2시 디자인 리뷰 미팅 참석합니다. 준비 자료는 Figma 링크로 공유했습니다.
